rooms.roomDescription: Superior Room - 1 King bed or 2 Twin beds, features a warm and welcoming décor with views of the city or the Mall of the Emirates. The rooms include a dining table with chairs for two. The spacious marble bathroom features double vanity with W/C and bidet as well as separate shower stall and bathtub. Rooms are equipped with high-speed wireless internet access, flat-screen TV, DVD player, in-room safe, mini-bar and service pantry. Inter-connecting room is not available. Maximum occupancy is 2 adults and 1 child in a baby crib or in existing bedding. The rooms measure 34 sq.m. (366 sq.ft.).

rooms.roomDescription: Presidential Suite - Two spacious bedrooms with one king bed each. A dedicated elevator ensures privacy at all times and your every wish is catered for with a private access for service behind a bar with counter. The entry foyer opens up to a generous living room next to a dining salon seating up to six. Invite family and friends for a soiree on your own private terrace. A guest powder room ensures enhanced privacy. The bedrooms include a spacious lounge area, adjacent to a large walk-in closet. The bathrooms kept in marble feature double vanity, separate W/C and bidet, a shower stall and bathtub. For the guest’s convenience a personal maid’s room is located near the service entrance, also featuring a full bathroom. Guests may enjoy exclusive access to the Executive Lounge where breakfast, afternoon tea and evening drinks with canapés are served on complimentary basis.
